rows.label: qev055501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, your timing is perfect.
I am glad that I waited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0002
rows.name:
I heard from the residents that you are
the one who resolves any difficult problem
with a 100% success rate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0003
rows.name:
To tell the truth, I have recently found it difficult
to grasp the will of my Ovah... and I am at a loss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0010
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if such a problem could really
happen to an Orphean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if he has any idea
what the cause might be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0004
rows.name:
The probability is not 0%.
It can be influenced by one's environment at the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Furthermore, I hear that if one reaches a state of decline
due to old age, they can go berserk and become unmanageable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0006
rows.name:
However, I am still a young seed.
Therefore, I should be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0007
rows.name:
This phenomenon began after moving to NLA,
so the cause may lie here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0008
rows.name: But I have not been able to pinpoint it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0009
rows.name: I intend to try a conceivable treatment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0010
rows.name:
The procedure is simple. I just need to harvest and ingest
a Lumenoa Herb that grows on the land of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I researched this method in a database
back when I was a researcher for Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Please, could I ask you to harvest
that herb in my stead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I hear that herb can be acquired on
the Far Isle of Tzu'o in the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0014
rows.name:
I am certain you will grant my request
with a 100% success rate. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0015
rows.name:
According to our investigations, that herb can be acquired on
the Far Isle of Tzu'o in the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0016
rows.name:
This will surely return me to normal.
I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Ah... it is you.
I have been waiting for you.
Did you bring the herb?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Thank you.
*gulp* *gulp*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Oh! Its effect is outstanding.
The will of my Ovah has become clear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Hm!? Could this be... my word...
Is the time truly upon me right now...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Have I been unable to sense something
this important... up until now...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nan'osarag what is happening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0040
rows.name: Indifference[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0041
rows.name: Pay no mind to Nan'osarag's unusual behavior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0053
rows.name:
When the time comes, all Orphe divide their bodies
and multiply...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0054
rows.name:
And... the Ovah flowing within me
is calling out for me to divide at this very moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0055
rows.name:
...Ah... I must divide this life...
as soon as possible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0058
rows.name:
...I must begin immediately...
I will divide my life right now, at this very second...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0061
rows.name:
Ugh... Gigyee...
Rururururururururururururu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0064
rows.name:
Who are you...!?
Why has an Orphean like you emerged from me!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0067
rows.name:
Who... am I?
Why am I in a place like this...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0068
rows.name:
This isn't... my home...!
I have to... get back to the forest quickly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0070
rows.name: ...What on earth is the meaning of this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0071
rows.name:
Normally, a divided entity is born with an appearance
almost identical to the division source, which is me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0072
rows.name:
However, that one... had an appearance
unlike any Orphean...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0073
rows.name:
Moreover, it seemed terribly confused...
It appeared unable to fully comprehend the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0051
rows.name: Express concern for the Orphean that ran off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0060
rows.name: Speculate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say it might be a sudden mutation
influenced by Mira's environment.

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0080
rows.name:
Yes, of course...
Now is the time for swift action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0083
rows.name:
I see...
Your speculation is perfectly logical.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0084
rows.name:
That possibility is high. Individuals like that
did not exist on our home planet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0085
rows.name: In any case, we must speak with it quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0088
rows.name:
There is an 89.6% probability that it went to the
Nightglow Forest. Could you please bring it back?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0089
rows.name:
Perhaps due to the effects of the division,
my body will not move as I wish...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0090
rows.name:
I implore you. In that state, it will be instantly devoured
if it is spotted by native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0025
rows.name:
That divided entity had a completely different appearance
from the rest of us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0026
rows.name:
It was red, and the shape of its antennae was like so...
I have never seen an Orphean like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0027
rows.name:
...In any case, we must speak with it.
Please retrieve it from the Nightglow Forest at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0028
rows.name:
An appearance entirely different from ours...
I see, I am beginning to understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0029
rows.name:
This divided entity must have been born because I interacted
with so many Earthlings in the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0030
rows.name:
The concept of gender that exists among Earthlings
does not exist for the Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0031
rows.name:
It would be no exaggeration to say that this is
truly a new species born from us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0032
rows.name:
...I don't care if I'm new or old.
I don't have a name, so could you hurry up and give me one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0110
rows.name: Scold[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0111
rows.name:
Scold Nan'osarag, telling him that despite the
different outside, they are still comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_JNK0120
rows.name: Comfort[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_SEL0121
rows.name: Soothe the divided entity to calm her anger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0033
rows.name:
Y-Yes, you are right.
I am sorry, please forgive me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0034
rows.name:
As long as you understand, my division source.
Now, hurry up and name me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Since my savior is telling me that,
I have no choice but to stay quiet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0036
rows.name:
But I hate not having a name.
Division source, name me quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Since you are my divided entity,
you shall be named Nen'osarag.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0038
rows.name: Then I shall take that name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Let me reintroduce myself. I am Nen'osarag.
Thank you for saving me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0040
rows.name:
This is a token of our gratitude.
...Come on, hand it to our savior quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0041
rows.name:
We are in your debt.
Please, take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now that we've handed over the reward,
teach me all sorts of things right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Yes, I will keep you company.
As your division source.[ST:wait ]
